task_description: Generate a changelog for version 5.0.0 of a mobile SDK from the provided commit history.

commits.message: BREAKING: migrate from callbacks to async/await API
commits.author: ian

commits.message: feat: add offline event batching with configurable flush interval
commits.author: julia

commits.message: BREAKING: drop support for iOS 14 and Android API 26
commits.author: ian

commits.message: feat: add automatic screen view tracking
commits.author: kate

commits.message: fix: resolve crash on app backgrounding during event flush
commits.author: julia

commits.message: feat: add consent management framework for GDPR/CCPA
commits.author: liam

commits.message: fix: correct timestamp drift when device clock changes
commits.author: kate

commits.message: BREAKING: rename AnalyticsConfig to SDKConfiguration for clarity
commits.author: ian

commits.message: feat: add A/B test assignment tracking
commits.author: liam

commits.message: security: encrypt locally cached events at rest
commits.author: julia

commits.message: fix: reduce SDK initialization time from 800ms to 150ms
commits.author: kate
